---
title: "Codex — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico v3 (CLI local)"
source-title: "Codex"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

# === Config do notebook ===
SOURCE_KEY    = "codex"
SOURCE_TITLE  = "Codex"
SOURCE_COLOR  = "#374151"   # OpenAI dev cinza escuro
MUTED         = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED     = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Codex"
TABLES        = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES    = []
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **Sobre Codex CLI:** parquets capturados via copia incremental de
> `~/.codex/sessions/`. Source: `codex`, mode: `cli`. Feature distintiva:
> `function_call` correlacionado com `exec_command_end` via `call_id` →
> `duration_ms` + `success` exatos. `agent_reasoning` acumulado vira
> `thinking` da proxima `agent_message`.

{{< include _template.qmd >}}
